title: spiranthes suishaensis
intro: Spiranthes suishaensis, also known as the Japanese ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid native to Japan. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The roots of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health and immune system function.
